history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with curly black hair, wearing a black baseball cap and a white long-sleeved sweatshirt, is posing in front of a wall with shelves. He has headphones around his neck. On the shelves behind him are various items, including what appear to be cassette tapes, records, and a toy or game box on the top shelf. To his left, a skateboard is propped against the wall, with a poster or graphic on it. Another skateboard is visible in the foreground, partially obscuring a poster on the wall. The lighting is soft and appears to be coming from the front, casting gentle shadows. The overall mood is casual and perhaps a bit nostalgic, with a focus on personal interests like music and skateboarding. The color palette is dominated by neutral tones of beige, white, and black, with pops of color from the items on the shelves and the skateboards.
